title: The Election Laws (Amendment) Act, 2021
text: NOTIFICAnON New Delhi, the 17t h June, 2022 5.0. 2805(E).-ln exercise of the powers conferred by sub-se ctio n (2) of sect ion I of the Election Laws (Amendment) Act , 2021 (49 of 2021), the Central Government hereby appoints the 1st August , 2022 as the date on which the provisions of the said Act shall come into force. [F. No. H-11019 /4/2019-Leg.Il] DIW AKAR SINGH, Jt.
